title: [Voyager Surround 85] TC-001: Environment Surround Level Persists After Switching to Speech and Back
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Surround 85] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Set the Surround level slider to 85.
Tap the Speech sub-setting tab.
Observe the Free level slider (do not change it).
Tap the Environment sub-setting tab again.
Observe the Surround level slider value.
expected: The Surround level slider should still display 85. The value must not revert to default (0 or mid-range).

title: [Voyager Surround 85] TC-002: Speech Free Level Persists After Switching to Environment and Back
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Surround 85] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Set the Free level slider to 60.
Tap the Environment sub-setting tab.
Observe the Surround level slider (do not change it).
Tap the Speech sub-setting tab again.
Observe the Free level slider value.
expected: The Free level slider should still display 60. The value must not revert to default (0 or mid-range).

title: [Voyager Surround 85] TC-003: Both Sub-Settings Retain Independent Values After Multiple Switches
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Surround 85] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Set the Surround level slider to 100.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Set the Free level slider to 0.
Switch back to the Environment sub-setting tab.
Verify the Surround level slider shows 100.
Switch back to the Speech sub-setting tab.
Verify the Free level slider shows 0.
Repeat steps 8-11 two more times.
expected: Each sub-setting independently retains its last set value (Surround=100, Free=0) across all tab switches. Values must not cross-contaminate or revert to defaults.

title: [Voyager Surround 85] TC-004: Extreme Value Persistence — Surround=0 and Free=100 After Tab Switching
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Surround 85] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Set the Surround level slider to 0 (minimum).
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Set the Free level slider to 100 (maximum).
Switch back to the Environment sub-setting tab.
Verify the Surround level slider shows 0.
Switch back to the Speech sub-setting tab.
Verify the Free level slider shows 100.
expected: Both extreme values (Surround=0, Free=100) persist correctly after switching tabs. No reversion to defaults.

title: [Voyager Surround 85] TC-005: Rapid Tab Switching Does Not Corrupt Sub-Setting Values
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Surround 85] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Set the Surround level slider to 75.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Set the Free level slider to 25.
Rapidly tap between Environment and Speech tabs 10 times (alternating each tap).
After the rapid switching, select the Environment tab.
Verify the Surround level slider shows 75.
Select the Speech tab.
Verify the Free level slider shows 25.
expected: After rapid tab switching, both sub-setting values (Surround=75, Free=25) remain intact and unchanged.

title: [Voyager Surround 85] TC-016: Sub-Setting Persistence After App Backgrounding and Foregrounding
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Surround 85] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Set the Surround level slider to 90.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Set the Free level slider to 30.
Press the Home button to background the app.
Wait 5 seconds.
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app from the app switcher.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Verify the Surround level slider shows 90.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Verify the Free level slider shows 30.
expected: Both sub-setting values (Surround=90, Free=30) persist after the app is backgrounded and foregrounded. No values revert to defaults.

title: [Voyager Free 60+] TC-017: Sub-Setting Persistence After App Force-Kill and Relaunch
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Free 60+] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Set the Surround level slider to 80.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Set the Free level slider to 40.
Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from recent apps).
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Wait for the app to connect to [Voyager Free 60+].
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Verify the Surround level slider shows 80.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Verify the Free level slider shows 40.
expected: Both sub-setting values (Surround=80, Free=40) persist after the app is force-killed and relaunched. The values are saved to the device and restored correctly.

title: [Voyager Free 20] TC-018: Sub-Setting Persistence After Bluetooth Disconnect and Reconnect
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Free 20] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Set the Surround level slider to 70.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Set the Free level slider to 50.
Disconnect Bluetooth from the phone's Bluetooth settings.
Wait 3 seconds.
Reconnect Bluetooth to [Voyager Free 20].
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and wait for connection.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Verify the Surround level slider shows 70.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Verify the Free level slider shows 50.
expected: Both sub-setting values (Surround=70, Free=50) persist after Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect cycle. The values are stored on the device and restored upon reconnection.

title: [Voyager Surround 85] TC-019: Sub-Setting Persistence After Device Power Off and On
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Surround 85] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Set the Surround level slider to 95.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Set the Free level slider to 15.
Power off the Voyager Surround 85 device.
Wait 5 seconds.
Power on the Voyager Surround 85 device.
Wait for the device to reconnect to the phone.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and wait for connection.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Verify the Surround level slider shows 95.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Verify the Free level slider shows 15.
expected: Both sub-setting values (Surround=95, Free=15) persist after the device is powered off and on. The values are stored in device NVM and restored correctly.

title: [Voyager Free 60+] TC-020: Sub-Setting Persistence After Phone Reboot
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected phone.
Tap [Voyager Free 60+] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Set the Surround level slider to 45.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Set the Free level slider to 55.
Reboot the phone.
After phone restarts, ensure Bluetooth is enabled.
Wait for [Voyager Free 60+] to reconnect automatically.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and wait for connection.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Select the Environment sub-setting tab.
Verify the Surround level slider shows 45.
Select the Speech sub-setting tab.
Verify the Free level slider shows 55.
expected: Both sub-setting values (Surround=45, Free=55) persist after a phone reboot. The values are stored on the device and restored when the app reconnects.
